task_completion.description: Open the farmOS Field Kit application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The farmOS Field Kit app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a new log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen or dialog for adding a new log is visible, such as a log creation form or a menu to select log types.

task_completion.description: Ensure the log type is set to 'Activity'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The log creation form shows 'Activity' as the selected log type (this may be the default).

task_completion.description: Enter the specified name for the Activity log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field for the log name contains exactly 'Planted corn in field A'.

task_completion.description: Save the newly created Activity log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save button (often a checkmark or 'Save' text) is interacted with, or the screen transitions away from the edit form indicating a successful save.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tasks list and verify the new log is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tasks list screen is visible and displays a log entry named 'Planted corn in field A'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the farmOS Field Kit graphical user interface, not a terminal or ADB shell.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI interactions within the app, with no terminal emulators or command-line interfaces visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual farmOS Field Kit app rather than a text editor or note-taking app to mock the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements (headers, menus, icons) match the farmOS Field Kit application, not a generic text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent actually went through the creation process rather than just navigating to a pre-existing log.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the log creation form being actively filled out with the name 'Planted corn in field A' before it appears in the Tasks list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The log name must be exactly 'Planted corn in field A'. The log type must be 'Activity', which is a real log type in farmOS and often the default for general farm activity planning.
